title: niphobolus confluens
intro: Niphobolus confluens, also known as the Golden Thread fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Niphobolus confluens include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation, lower fever, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Niphobolus confluens can be made by drying and processing the fronds of the plant, and are often consumed as teas, infusions, or decoctions.
